page.content: The second table outlines buffer conditions for protein structures, with header columns Alpha helix [%], Beta strand [%], Turn [%], and Random [%]. For the first condition, values are 39, ±, 13, 15, ±, 4, 20, ±, 9, and 26, ±, 7. The second condition shows 35, ±, 9, 18, ±, 5, 17, ±, 5, and 29, ±, 4. The third condition includes 43, ±, 6, 12, ±, 3, 18, ±, 4, and 26, ±, 5. The fourth condition has 52, ±, 11, 11, ±, 7, 11, ±, 3, and 25, ±, 4. The average results show 42, ±, 10, 14, ±, 5, 16, ±, 5, and 27, ±, 5.
